taxonomy: Cordia clarendonensis is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to Jamaica. The species is part of the genus Cordia, which consists of around 250 species of tropical and subtropical trees and shrubs. The classification of Cordia clarendonensis is further divided into its binomial nomenclature, being classified as a plant species under the kingdom Plantae. Its classification is based on the Linnaean system of taxonomy.
